synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-19434 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 xorg-x11-server security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-19434

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-19434.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
xorg-x11-server-Xdmx-1.20.11-27.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xephyr-1.20.11-27.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

xorg-x11-server-Xvfb-1.20.11-27.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-common-1.20.11-27.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-devel-1.20.11-27.el8_10.i686.rpm
xorg-x11-server-devel-1.20.11-27.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-source-1.20.11-27.el8_10.noarch.rpm

aarch64:

xorg-x11-server-Xvfb-1.20.11-27.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-common-1.20.11-27.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-devel-1.20.11-27.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
